2343560.name: SangRaciner
2343560.description:
The game


The adventure takes place in 1911 in France, during the heat wave summer which raged that year, in the Bataillon's estate and you play:

  • Rose Darras, a young Parisian bourgeois, visits her uncle Georges Bataillon, following a strange letter she received from him. Intrigued, she decides to take the long road that separates her from the Bataillon's estate. His story begins when he arrives on the property, the gates are closed...

    The way you play and respond to events during the game will directly influence the inhabitants of the manor, and their state of health...

    His development


    SangRaciner is the first game from "Still A Dream Game Studio". The project started in 2019 and was designed by two brothers: François and Rudy Linck.

    Other information


    • A (free) demo will be available when the game is released.
    • Playable with gamepad and/or keyboard + mouse
    • The game is in “Fixed Camera” the control of the character will be done in two ways: “Old-School” (Tank mode) and/or “Modern” (360 degree free mode) whatever the device used (keyboard + mouse and/or gamepad).

    Various defense weapons


    You will encounter enemies during the adventure and defense weapons will be your best ally:

    • Firearms are formidable but limited in ammunition.
    • Melee (one-handed) weapons are fast but will put you in danger.
    • Melee (two-handed) weapons are slow but powerful with moderate distance.

    Various puzzles


    Solve puzzles in several different ways, simple example:

    • There's something in the chimney, how do I get it back?
    • You can use a bucket of water, or a long "object" that does not fear fire, or a chimney tong...

    Various options


    Configure the game as you wish:

    • Language: English / French
    • Text size: small / medium / large
    • Show/hide HUD display
    • Adjust volumes through different channels
    • Change/modify keyboard + mouse and/or gamepad controls
    • Accessibility for color blindness (turn on/off and adjust intensity)
    • Accessibility for the deaf or hard of hearing (displays icons + extended subtitle)
    • Accessibility for the visually impaired (displays different color channels for better visibility, possibility to adjust)

    Based on a novel



    This game is based on the French novel “La Malédiction Bataillon” by François Linck.
    We deliberately reworked the story of the game, so as to have two distinct works.
